title: prunus glandulosa var. sinensis
intro: Prunus glandulosa var. sinensis, also known as Chinese cherry or dwarf cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and parts of Korea, belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Prunus glandulosa var. sinensis include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress, as well as support cardiovascular and immune system health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
